title: redhat-rpm-config bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[293-1.0.1]
- Disabled changelog trimming for kernel-uek package [Orabug: 36807719]

[293-1]
- Add riscv64 config (RHEL-85862)

[292-1]
- Use Fat LTO with Clang

[290-1]
- Use upstream versions of find-provides/requires (RHEL-39760)
- brp-mangle-shebangs: Strip env flags when mangling shebangs (RHEL-84703)
full_text:
[293-1.0.1]
- Disabled changelog trimming for kernel-uek package [Orabug: 36807719]

[293-1]
- Add riscv64 config (RHEL-85862)

[292-1]
- Use Fat LTO with Clang

[290-1]
- Use upstream versions of find-provides/requires (RHEL-39760)
- brp-mangle-shebangs: Strip env flags when mangling shebangs (RHEL-84703)
